Engine.Name: UnifiedCandidateScorer
Engine.Description: Single scoring pipeline: score(UnifiedCandidate, QueryContext) -> UnifiedScore with per-feature explanation
Engine.Output: UnifiedScore with FinalScore [0..1], per-feature breakdown, and human-readable rationale

Features.Description: Semantic, lexical, and anchor match strength between query and candidate
Features.Explainability: top 3 contributing terms/anchors with individual scores

Features.Computation: AuthorityKind mapping: Authoritative=1.0, Shadow=0.7, Derived=0.5, Diagnostic=0.3, Synthetic=0.1

Features.Description: Temporal relevance — how recently the candidate was created/updated
How well the candidate fits the target section/packaging structure
Features.Explainability: target section, estimated tokens vs budget, lifecycle impact

Features.Description: User preference signals from feedback, implicit interaction, explicit selection
Features.Computation: weighted preference signal aggregation (feedback + selection + interaction)

Penalties: Lifecycle penalty: Rejected -0.4, Deprecated -0.22, Superseded -0.22, Historical -0.16
Hard exclusion: content matching '绝不使用/彻底舍弃不用' → score=0

DeprecatedScoring: ItemScoreBreakdown (13-dimension) in BasicContextPackageBuilder.cs — replaced by UnifiedCandidateScorer
ScoreWorkingMemoryForAnchors() in BasicContextPackageBuilder.cs — replaced by Relevance feature
ScoreStableMemoryForInjection() in ContextRecallSignalPolicy.cs — split into Relevance + Authority + Freshness
LifecycleAwareRankerShadowScorer — absorbed into Freshness/StructuralFit with diagnostic override
LexicalCandidateProvider.ScoreEntry() — absorbed into Relevance feature (lexical sub-dimension)
HybridCandidateBuilder.Build() — replaced by UnifiedCandidate construction via CandidateAggregator
